testcase.name: endToEndFlow

failure.message: Test failed due to exception: Signup failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //button[contains(text(),'Sign me up') or contains(text(),'Sign me up for Free')] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.117, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\admin\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63534}, goog:processID: 7536, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63534/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.117, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 83ef152ac5857d50086db7ad4743f580
